Description: The TPS565208 is a monolithic, 5-A synchronous step-down DC/DC converter in a SOT-23 package. It employs D-CAP2™ mode control for fast transient response without requiring external compensation, supports a 4.5-V to 17-V input range, and is optimized for low external component count and low standby current. It includes integrated power MOSFETs, fixed-frequency operation, and comprehensive protection features.

Functions.FunctionDescription: Source terminal of low-side NFET and controller ground. Connect sensitive VFB to this GND at a single point.
Connection between the high-side and low-side power NFETs.
Input voltage supply. Drain terminal of the high-side power NFET.
Converter feedback input. Connect to the output voltage via a resistor divider.
Active-high enable control input. Must be pulled high to enable the device.
Supply input for the high-side NFET gate driver. Connect a 0.1 µF capacitor between VBST and SW.
